response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No lyric/vocal reference was provided since the video is entirely dialogue. Transcribed fully from native Japanese audio. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the reference lyrics section since there's no music, relying strictly on visual cues and manual phonetic translation. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to trigger precisely when members speak, with aggressive truncation applied during fast-paced segments to keep up with the dialogue.

subtitles.original: なるようになる！
subtitles.english: It'll work out!

subtitles.original: でもこれで知ってくれた人もいるよね、たぶん。
subtitles.english: But there are probably people who came to know us through this, right?

subtitles.original: ねえ！絶対そう！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Absolutely!

subtitles.original: もう1枚やります、トーン！
subtitles.english: Let's do one more. Bam!

subtitles.original: おお！え、待って、新宿？
subtitles.english: Oh! Wait, Shinjuku?

subtitles.original: あれ、後ろも写ってる？あれ聞いてた？
subtitles.english: Wait, is that us in the back too? Did we hear about that?

subtitles.original: 聞いてないよ！
subtitles.english: I didn't hear about that!

subtitles.original: 待って、今日のあの21時前に流れていたあのよくわからない...
subtitles.english: Wait, that mysterious video playing before 21:00 today...

subtitles.original: あのよくわからない... おい、流れてたのかよ！大丈夫か？
subtitles.english: That mysterious... Hey, was it playing?! Is it okay?

subtitles.original: でも、もっとさ、なんかかっこいいMVとかさ、ライブ映像とか流したらもっと...
subtitles.english: But if they played a cooler MV or live concert footage, it would be...

subtitles.original: どういうこと？どういうこと？
subtitles.english: What do you mean? What do you mean?

subtitles.original: いや、でもありがとう！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: No, but thank you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: ということで、こちら、応募どれぐらい来たと思う？
subtitles.english: So, how many applications do you think we got for this?

subtitles.original: でもさ、お仕事だからね。お仕事だからやっぱり...
subtitles.english: But you know, it's a workday. Since it's work, after all...

subtitles.original: 100人とか来てくれてる？
subtitles.english: Maybe like 100 people came?

subtitles.original: そう、大変だからね。
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's tough, right?

subtitles.original: なんと！数千人の応募が来ているということです！
subtitles.english: Incredibly, we received several thousand applications!

subtitles.original: ええええ？！すごすぎる！
subtitles.english: Whaaaat?! That's amazing!

subtitles.original: うれしい！ありがとう！驚きすぎ、驚きすぎ。
subtitles.english: So happy! Thank you! Surprised too much, surprised too much.

subtitles.original: 給料もらったからって...
subtitles.english: Just because we got paid...

subtitles.original: 給料もらったからって、決まってるわけじゃない...
subtitles.english: Just because we got paid, it doesn't mean...

subtitles.original: あの、いろはより多めに渡してます。
subtitles.english: We paid her more than Iroha.

subtitles.original: ちょっとやめて、福利厚生、タイムイさんですからね。
subtitles.english: Stop that. Welfare program, it's thanks to Timee-san.

subtitles.original: タイムイさん、ありがとうございます。そして、応募してくれた19人のみんなもありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much, Timee-san. And thank you to the 19 people who applied too.

subtitles.original: そして、次はなんだ？おお！オープン！
subtitles.english: And what's next? Oh! Open!

subtitles.original: 来い来い来い！何これ？お、来た！じゃじゃーん！タワーコラボだ！
subtitles.english: Come on, come on! What is this? Oh, here it is! Ta-da! It's a tower collaboration!

subtitles.original: タワー！
subtitles.english: Tower!

subtitles.original: ということで、皆さんタワーコラボ、もう情報公開されていますが、こちら！
subtitles.english: So, everyone, the information for the tower collaboration has already been released, but here it is!

subtitles.original: 全国4カ所で行われる、holoXタワーインベージョン！
subtitles.english: The holoX Tower Invasion, held at four locations nationwide!

subtitles.original: 12月4日から開催されます！札幌テレビ塔、東京タワー、中部電力ミライタワー、梅田スカイビルで開催されますので、ぜひ、皆さん行ってくださいね！
subtitles.english: It will be held starting December 4th! It will take place at Sapporo TV Tower, Tokyo Tower, Chubu Electric Power MIRAI TOWER, and Umeda Sky Building, so please go visit, everyone!

subtitles.original: 行ってねー！俺たちが、俺たちがタワーです！
subtitles.english: Please go! We are... We are the towers!

subtitles.original: おい、おい！今回大事なことがあるんですけど、ちゃんと予約しておかないとですね、皆さん入れないんで。事前予約必須です！
subtitles.english: Hey, hey! There's an important thing this time: if you don't make a reservation properly, you won't be able to get in. Advance reservations are mandatory!

subtitles.original: そう、そうなんです。事前予約忘れてる人も多分いると思うので。
subtitles.english: Yes, that's right. Some people might have forgotten to make an advance reservation.

subtitles.original: その場で行っても入れないらしいです。
subtitles.english: Apparently, you can't enter even if you go there in person.

subtitles.original: そう、予約を忘れずに！
subtitles.english: Yes, don't forget to reserve!

subtitles.original: 事前予約よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please make your advance reservations!

subtitles.original: しとかないと、しとかないと。はい、お次！オープン！
subtitles.english: Gotta do it, gotta do it. Okay, next! Open!

subtitles.original: はい！なんと、なんと！ホロライブの新サービス、新しいサービス、ライブの感動を最速でお届け！
subtitles.english: Yes! Unbelievably! Hololive's new service, a new service to deliver the excitement of the live concert at the fastest speed!

subtitles.original: おお、すごい！どういうこと？
subtitles.english: Oh, amazing! What does that mean?

subtitles.original: 秘密結社holoX、4周年のライブブロマイドが、なんと！今日のライブの写真が、明日からコンビニでプリントアウトできるんだ！
subtitles.english: The Secret Society holoX 4th Anniversary Live Bromide, incredibly! The photos from today's concert can be printed out at convenience stores starting tomorrow!

subtitles.original: えええ！手に入るんだ！すごーい！対象店舗は、ファミリーマート、ローソン、ミニストップになります！
subtitles.english: Whaaat! You can get them! That's awesome! The target stores are FamilyMart, Lawson, and Ministop!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ありがとうございます！いっぱいある！
subtitles.english: Yay! Thank you very much! There are so many!

subtitles.original: そして、今からネットで事前購入ができるらしいです。
subtitles.english: And apparently, you can purchase them online starting now.

subtitles.original: マジで？！
subtitles.english: Really?!

subtitles.original: ただね、明日からコンビニでも写真を選びながら購入することもできるみたいなので、詳しくは左下のリンクから確認してみてください！
subtitles.english: However, starting tomorrow, it seems you can also purchase them while choosing the photos at convenience stores. For details, please check the link in the bottom left!

subtitles.original: こっちこっちこっち！
subtitles.english: Over here, over here!

subtitles.original: さらにですね、今回は、そちらのお写真に、ブロマイドに、私達のメッセージをつけることができるみたいなんですけど...
subtitles.english: Furthermore, this time, it seems we can add our messages to those photos, to the bromides...

subtitles.original: えええ！すごい！
subtitles.english: Wow! Amazing!

subtitles.original: 今から書く。今から書く？
subtitles.english: We're writing them now. Writing them now?

subtitles.original: え、ちょっと待って！ここで書くの？！
subtitles.english: Wait a minute! We're writing them here?!

subtitles.original: 考えて、書いてください。
subtitles.english: Think about it, and please write.

subtitles.original: はい！え、はい...
subtitles.english: Yes! Wait, yes...

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、何書こう...
subtitles.english: Wait a minute, what should I write...

subtitles.original: 時間も迫ってますから、早く書いてくださいね。
subtitles.english: Time is running out, so please write quickly.

subtitles.original: 意外と集中力使う。
subtitles.english: This actually takes a lot of concentration.

subtitles.original: よし、書けた！
subtitles.english: Alright, I wrote it!

subtitles.original: 書けた？見せて！
subtitles.english: Did you write it? Let me see!

subtitles.original: これ、かわいい。ぽい、ぽい。こよっぽい。
subtitles.english: This is cute. It looks like it. Very Koyo-like.

subtitles.original: こよっぽい。みんな書けた？書いて、書いて。みんな出して。はい、お願いしますね。ということで、これでお願いします。
subtitles.english: Koyo-like. Did everyone write it? Write it, write it. Show it. Yes, please. So, we'll go with this.

subtitles.original: みんな何書いたかすごく気になると思うんですが、こちらのメッセージの内容は、みんなが...
subtitles.english: I'm sure everyone is very curious about what we wrote, but the content of these messages, everyone...

subtitles.original: あの、私が書いた...
subtitles.english: Um, what I wrote...

subtitles.original: ダメ、ダメ、ダメ！言っちゃダメ！
subtitles.english: No, no, no! Don't say it!

subtitles.original: ダメに決まってんだろ！サプライズだから！
subtitles.english: Of course not! It's a surprise!

subtitles.original: あ、ごめんなさい、ごめんなさい。
subtitles.english: Ah, sorry, sorry.

subtitles.original: はい、そして、まだ2枚あるんで。お次はこちら！
subtitles.english: Yes, and we still have two cards. Next is this!

subtitles.original: オープン！なんと！あの作品とコラボ！？
subtitles.english: Open! Unbelievably! A collaboration with *that* work!?

subtitles.original: え？！何、何？あの作品ってどれ？
subtitles.english: What?! What, what? Which work is "that" work?

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、これはマジで知らない。どれだ？あの作品って何ですか？
subtitles.english: Wait a minute, I seriously don't know this one. Which is it? What is "that work"?

subtitles.original: こちらをどうぞ！
subtitles.english: Here you go!
